name: Broccoli/Cheese Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange broccoli and cheese in pastry-lined pan.
2. Beat together eggs, cream, and spices in a bowl.
3. Pour the custard mixture over cheese and broccoli.
4. Place in preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes or until top is golden brown and knife inserted 1 inch from edge comes out clean.
